library.description: Personal reading catalog, mountain, survival, and natural history

book.title: Deep Survival
book.author: Laurence Gonzales
book.subject: Decision making and survival psychology
book.note: Maps closely to how people make calls in avalanche terrain

book.title: The Living Mountain
book.author: Nan Shepherd
book.subject: Natural history, mountain writing
book.note: Slow evening read, a few pages at a time

book.title: Snow Sense
book.author: Jill Fredston and Doug Fesler
book.subject: Avalanche hazard evaluation
book.note: Recommend it to every Avalanche Level 1 student

book.title: Staying Alive in Avalanche Terrain
book.author: Bruce Tremper
book.subject: Avalanche safety and terrain
book.note: The reference I reread before the season

book.title: Mountaineering, Freedom of the Hills
book.author: The Mountaineers
book.subject: Technical mountaineering reference
book.note: Reviewed the glacier travel chapters for Denali planning

book.title: The Worst Journey in the World
book.author: Apsley Cherry Garrard
book.subject: Polar exploration memoir

book.title: Denali West Buttress, route guide
book.author: Colby Coombs
book.subject: Expedition route planning
book.note: Read before the training block starts in fall

book.title: Training for the Uphill Athlete
book.author: Steve House and Scott Johnston
book.subject: Endurance training for mountains
book.note: For the Denali load carrying block
